title: aster sextilis
intro: Aster sextilis, also known as the Drummond's Aster, is a flowering plant species native to North America, specifically in the southern and western regions. It is a perennial herb used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Herbal preparations of Aster sextilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical applications for skin issues and internal remedies for digestive problems.
